title: Definitions
doc_html:
§1052.  Definitions

A.  "GIS" means geographic information system.

B.  "Secretary" in R.S. 49:1053 means the secretary of the department of the executive branch of state government to which reference is made.

Acts 1995, No. 922, §2.
doc_text:
§1052.  Definitions
A.  "GIS" means geographic information system.
B.  "Secretary" in R.S. 49:1053 means the secretary of the department of the executive branch of state government to which reference is made.
Acts 1995, No. 922, §2.
